mapper.select: { CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_SO_MISS_COMPLETE_LISTBYALL ( #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dtType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dcList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptTel ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refSoList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instCtgrList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soTypeList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soStatCdList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{missCloseTypeList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
